name: Caribbean Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 t Fresh thyme or 1/2 t Dried thyme
4 1/2 c Drained cooked black beans (three 16-oz cans)
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions and garlic; sauté until the onions are just softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in grated ginger root, thyme (fresh or dried), and ground allspice. Sauté for another 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until fragrant.
4. Add the drained black beans and orange juice to the skillet. Stir well to combine.
5. Cook the mixture over medium heat for about 15 minutes, stirring frequently to ensure even cooking and prevent burning.
6. Using a fork or the back of a spoon, mash some of the beans into the sauce for added texture.
7. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
8. Serve warm, ideally with mango salsa, though regular salsa, sour cream, or guacamole can also be served alongside.
